narrative: Pre-induction Sign In completed for elective laparoscopic cholecystectomy. Patient ID confirmed against wristband, site marked, procedure + consent verified by anesthesiologist + circulating RN. Anesthesia machine self-test passed; medications drawn + double-checked. Pulse oximeter on patient + functioning, SpO2 99% on room air. Allergy review: NKDA confirmed against EHR + patient. Difficult-airway assessment: Mallampati II, no aspiration risk; routine intubation plan. Blood-loss risk estimated <500 mL; two large-bore IVs in place. Antibiotic prophylaxis cefazolin 2 g IV administered 22 minutes before incision. Critical imaging (RUQ ultrasound) displayed on OR monitor.
